steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: The key signal is the flow from modern planes having sleeker, more streamlined bodies directly to much more aerodynamic. This establishes that the improved aerodynamics is a consequence of the streamlined design.

steps.title: Select the causal transition
steps.content: For this reason directly signals that what follows is a logical consequence of the preceding statement—the streamlined bodies cause the improved aerodynamics. The other choices wrongly suggest contrast (however, nevertheless) or enumeration (lastly). That matches choice D — D is correct.
